title.en: An illusory map appeared in front of Miao An, w...

content.en:
It didn't take long for these Dual Dao Realms to gradually adapt to the rules here.

Wow!

An illusory map appeared in front of Miao An, with standard locations on it.

In an instant, one of the locations began to zoom in.

"Ladies and gentlemen, our first destination is here-the Mountain Ghost Domain, there is a resource in the Mountain Ghost Territory, called the Supreme Ghost Stone, which is one of the many materials needed by the Taisu Palace. "

"You shouldn't know the situation of the Mountain Ghost Territory, so I'll talk about it. The Mountain Ghost Realm is mainly occupied by a group of creatures called Xuanlin Mountain Ghosts, most of these creatures are the first to the Dao realm, and a few are to the double Dao realm. Their intelligence is not high, but their combat effectiveness is not weak. You are equipped with the two-pattern Supreme Dao armor, and you have a strong ability to save your life, I need you to join forces to stop these Xuanlin Mountain ghosts, and I will go to find the Supreme Dao Ghost Stone. "

"Once you find enough Supreme Path Ghost Stones, retreat immediately. Don't think about killing all these Xuanlin Mountain ghosts, they are quite numerous, their strength is not weak, we don't have the ability to kill them yet! Moreover, we also have to guard against the attacks of other Dao Realms in Taisu Palace, for the sake of this quota, those Dao Realms may directly snatch them. "

After Miao An finished speaking, these Dao Realm people had a general understanding of the situation.

Afterwards, they began to travel to the Mountain Ghost Territory.

Along the way, they will also encounter other creatures, some comparable to the Double Dao Realm, but they have all been killed by the cooperation of many Dao Realms.

Of course, they were still very careful, after all, there was still an incomparably terrifying thing in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm—the most terrifying thing!

These Dao Strange Things are not only chances, but also extremely terrifying things, and when they encounter the ordinary Double Dao Realm, they will be killed instantly, and there is not even a trace of resistance here.

However, Miao An has a way to drive to the Dodge, so he dares to enter here.

"It's almost time for the mountain ghost to lead!"

Myaan shouted.

Knock knock knock!!!

Suddenly there was a drum sound between heaven and earth, and the sound of the drum came, making everyone in the Dao realm feel uncomfortable, and they were dizzy.

They are all in the Dao realm, making them all dizzy, how abnormal is this!

Immediately after, the void in the distance distorted, and a strange figure appeared, holding a huge drum behind it.

"The most Taoist wonder - Xuanming Drum!"

Miao An's face changed drastically.

The Ninth Strange Land Xuanlin Mountain Realm has the Absolute Dao Strange Things, but it does not mean that they will definitely be encountered, and the possibility of encountering the Extreme Dao Strange Objects in the periphery is not high.

But I didn't expect to come in such a short time, and I encountered a strange thing.

Then.

The weaker One Heavy Dao Realm body had already begun to crack, and if they were delayed for a few more seconds, they would all die.

Miao An didn't hesitate any longer, and offered a black scroll, which was covered with various supreme inscriptions.

In an instant, countless rays of light bloomed, shining on this piece of heaven and earth.

As soon as the Dao Strange Thing Xuanming Drum was illuminated by this light, it immediately retreated.

"Master Xuanmiao, what is this?"

There are some Supreme Dao realms that are terrified.

It's really that this supreme strange thing Xuanming Drum is too terrifying, and that terrifying aura seems to be able to kill them if it leaks a little.

"That's the Xuanming Drum of the Supreme Dao Strange Things, it is the Supreme Dao Strange Things born under the operation of the Supreme Dao rules, although they are powerful, they must follow certain rules, Taisu Palace has a way to expel them, but it is only to confuse them for a short time. Let's hurry away now, and don't linger here. "

Xuan Miao said.

"Good!"

They followed Xuan Miao and hurried quickly, and soon came to the Mountain Ghost Domain.

Since they had just encountered the strange things of the Supreme Dao, many of them were a little scared and worried.

I thought it was just a bit of an adventure, but I didn't expect there to be so many uncertainties.

At this moment, some of the Supreme Dao Realms even regretted it.

But they have already signed an oath and entered the Xuanlin Mountain Realm again, and they have no way to regret it.

"Strange things, something interesting!"

It was the first time Ye Tian had heard of this kind of thing, obviously because he had seen too little before.

This kind of Dao strange thing is terrifying and dangerous, but he feels that the value of the Dao strange thing must be very high.

He saw both fear and a hint of longing in his mysterious eyes.

If he could kill the Dao Strange Thing Xuan Ming Drum, he believed that Xuan Miao would definitely kill it at all costs.

But it's a pity that the difference in strength between the two sides is too big to be eliminated at all.

"The strength of this Supreme Dao Strange Thing is comparable to the Quadruple Dao Realm, the key is that it can exert its strength in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, and all the Double Dao Realm together, it can't kill the Xuanming Drum of the Supreme Dao Strange Thing!

Maybe you can give it a try in the future.

......

Mountain Ghost Collar.

Xuan Miao has led many Supreme Dao realms to come here.

At this time, Ye Tian had already sensed the mountain ghosts leading those Xuanlin mountain ghosts through copying his talent.

"There are a lot of ghosts in Xuanlin Mountain, all of them are Supreme Dao Realm existences, and this group of creatures is clearly the Supreme Dao Realm race!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Xuan Miao looked around and found no other Dao realms, which was a sigh of relief.

Obviously, the destination chosen by the other Dao Realms is not here, so there is a little less targeting.

"Fight quickly, you intercept this group of Xuanlin Mountain ghosts!"

Xuan Miao commanded.

Rumble!!!!!

These Supreme Dao Realms have taken action one after another, and the two-pattern Supreme Dao armor on their bodies has been fully opened.

"Kill!"

Many supreme realms killed the group of Xuanlin Mountain ghosts, and even the True River Valley Lord and True Yang also took action.

Ye Tian naturally also made a move, but he did not display a powerful Supreme Dao Rule and Supreme Dao Divine Power, and only showed a decent strength.

Thundered!!!!

All the ghosts of Xuanlin Mountain came out and fought against this group of Supreme Dao Realms.

There are about two white-headed Xuanlin Mountain ghosts here, and their number and strength are more powerful than the supreme realm present, but the supreme realm present has many treasures and life-saving things, so this can compete.

They tried their best to intercept this group of Xuanlin Mountain ghosts, and even tried their best to trap them.

Seeing that this group of Dao Realm had stopped the ghosts of Xuanlin Mountain, Miao An began to act.

She began to look for the Dao Ghost Stone, and the Dao Ghost Stone was easy to recognize, and it was not difficult to find.

Soon, she found a Divine Ghost Stone and immediately collected it.

As one after another Supreme Ghost Stones were found, Miao An was in a very good mood.

And not far from the mountain ghost collar, some figures gradually emerged.

At the head is another supreme Dao-level genius of Taisu Palace, Ming Ya!

At this time, Mingya also sensed the battle fluctuations of the Mountain Ghost Territory, so she used a secret treasure of the Supreme Dao to spy on it.

"Miao An actually chose this place too!"

Mingya frowned slightly.
